headline: How Starbucks’ New Tri-State Store Tests Its ‘Third Place’ Strategy And Loyalty Engine (SBUX)
summary: Starbucks recently began construction on a new, modern-format store at Russell Centre, adding its globally recognized coffee brand to anchors Kroger and Lowe’s and aiming to draw more daily traffic to the Tri-State retail hub. This expansion aligns with management’s broader push to reset the in-store experience and deepen loyalty engagement, underpinned by Starbucks’ extensive global footprint of over 41,000 locations and large Rewards member base. headline: Kroger buying regional grocer and pharmacy retailer Giant Eagle in deal valued at $1.65 billion
summary: Kroger is buying regional grocer and pharmacy retailer Giant Eagle in a deal valued at $1.65 billion.  Giant Eagle, which is privately held, has 197 supermarkets and 11 standalone pharmacies across northern Ohio, western Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland and Indiana.  Kroger has thousands of stores operating under various brands, including Ralphs, King Soopers, Smith’s and Fred Meyer.

content.title: Kroger buying regional grocer and pharmacy retailer Giant Eagle in deal valued at $1.65 billion

Giant Eagle, which is privately held, has 197 supermarkets and 11 standalone pharmacies across northern Ohio, western Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland and Indiana.  Kroger has thousands of stores operating under various brands, including Ralphs, King Soopers, Smith’s and Fred Meyer.

headline: Kroger Announces Agreement to Acquire Giant Eagle
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) and Giant Eagle, Inc. ("Giant Eagle") today announced a definitive agreement under which Kroger will acquire Giant Eagle, a leading family-owned food and pharmacy retailer with approximately $9 billion in annual sales and 197 supermarkets and 11 standalone pharmacies across northern Ohio, western Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland and Indiana. The transaction has been unanimously approved by Kroger's Board of Directors.

content.title: Kroger Announces Agreement to Acquire Giant Eagle

("Giant Eagle") today announced a definitive agreement under which Kroger will acquire Giant Eagle, a leading family-owned food and pharmacy retailer with approximately $9 billion in annual sales and 197 supermarkets and 11 standalone pharmacies across northern Ohio, western Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland and Indiana. The transaction has been unanimously approved by Kroger's Board of Directors.

headline: Can Kroger’s giant Eagle deal unlock the next growth phase?
summary: Investing.com -- Kroger announced a deal to acquire family-owned grocer Giant Eagle for $1.65 billion, adding approximately $9 billion in annual sales and 197 supermarkets to its footprint in a transaction Wolfe Research said signals the company is "increasingly being run more offensively."

headline: Kroger to buy grocer Giant Eagle as competition heats up
summary:
STORY: :: Kroger

Shares of U.S. grocer Kroger fell about 2% Wednesday morning after the company said it would buy regional supermarket chain Giant Eagle in a nearly $1.7 billion deal.

:: Archive

The move strengthens Kroger's presence in the Midwest and the Mid-Atlantic region amid intensifying competition.

The transaction is the first under CEO Greg Foran, and is also Kroger's first major acquisition since its $25 billion merger with Albertsons fell apart in 2024.

:: Archive

Family-owned Giant Eagle generates about $9 billion in annual sales. It operates nearly 200 supermarkets and about a dozen standalone pharmacies across parts of Ohio, Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland and Indiana.

:: Kroger

Foran said the chain was a good strategic fit for Kroger, which has been battling intense competition from Walmart, Amazon and other grocers as still-elevated inflation has many consumers seeking cheaper essentials.

Kroger has previously said it plans to cut prices on thousands of items, funded partly by direct imports and better use of technology.

The Giant Eagle acquisition is expected to close in 2027.

content.title: Kroger to buy grocer Giant Eagle as competition heats up

Family-owned Giant Eagle generates about $9 billion in annual sales. It operates nearly 200 supermarkets and about a dozen standalone pharmacies across parts of Ohio, Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland and Indiana.

Foran said the chain was a good strategic fit for Kroger, which has been battling intense competition from Walmart, Amazon and other grocers as still-elevated inflation has many consumers seeking cheaper essentials.

headline: Kroger buying regional grocer Giant Eagle in a deal valued at $1.65 billion
summary: Kroger said Wednesday it plans to buy regional grocer and pharmacy retailer Giant Eagle in a deal valued at $1.65 billion.  Giant Eagle, which is privately held, has 197 supermarkets and 11 standalone pharmacies across northern Ohio, western Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland and Indiana.  Kroger, which is the largest U.S. supermarket chain, has 2,685 stores in 35 states and the District of Columbia.

content.title: Kroger buying regional grocer Giant Eagle in a deal valued at $1.65 billion
content.summary: Kroger said Wednesday it plans to buy regional grocer and pharmacy retailer Giant Eagle in a deal valued at $1.65 billion.  Giant Eagle, which is privately held, has 197 supermarkets and 11 standalone pharmacies across northern Ohio, western Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland and Indiana.  Kroger, which is the largest U.S. supermarket chain, has 2,685 stores in 35 states and the District of Columbia.

thumbnail.caption: FILE - A man walks out of the Giant Eagle grocery store Thursday, Nov. 17, 2011, in Mayfield Heights, Ohio. (AP Photo/Tony Dejak, File)

headline: Kroger Tries a Smaller Grocery Deal After Albertsons Merger Fizzled
summary: Kroger said it would acquire privately held Giant Eagle for $1.65 billion. Kroger’s potential merger with Albertsons was blocked by a federal judge halted the deal in late 2024.

content.title: Kroger Tries a Smaller Grocery Deal After Albertsons Merger Fizzled
content.summary: Kroger said it would acquire privately held Giant Eagle for $1.65 billion. Kroger’s potential merger with Albertsons was blocked by a federal judge halted the deal in late 2024.
